title: 🔥周期比较继续失真，MVRV仍压在低位
body: 市场仍在弱势磨底。核心信号是MVRV仅1.23，明显低于上轮同期的1.69（2022-03），说明本轮链上盈利修复依旧滞后。AHR999只有0.34，价格仍低于200日定投成本约22.0%，筹码端尚未回到健康扩张区。综合判断：中性偏空。这种低盈利、慢修复的状态还要拖多久？
title_en: 🔥 Cycle Comparison Still Distorted, MVRV Remains Pinned Low
body_en: The market is still grinding through a weak bottoming phase. The key signal is MVRV at just 1.23, still well below the 1.69 seen in the same period of the previous cycle (2022-03), showing that on-chain profitability recovery remains lagging this time. AHR999 is only 0.34, while price is still about 22.0% below the 200-day DCA cost, meaning positioning has not yet returned to a healthy expansion zone. Overall verdict: neutral-to-bearish. How much longer can this low-profit, slow-repair regime last?
